creator: pankov_p@mail.ru
text:
Not sure if it belongs here or should be sent to Security Officer, but here is the proposed change for the vuln.xml about the transparent mode advisory ( http://www.kb.cert.org/vuls/id/435052 ): ziproxy -- HTTP Host header incorrect relay behavior in transparent mode ziproxy 2.7.0

Ziproxy developers report:

In transparent mode, ziproxy trusts the host and port provided in the HTTP headers. This may be exploited using a hand-crafted HTTP request so to access arbitrary websites.

http://sourceforge.net/mailarchive/message.php?msg_name=200902231322.55722.dancab%40gmx.net 33858 CVE-2009-0804 435052 2009-02-23 2009-04-15
